title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited!
